one_time_description: Drinking water settlement payment received ($77,382 in 2024, compared to $500,000 in 2023)
economic_notes: Nation operates B.C. Cattle Co. Limited (livestock/breeding herd), SXD Limited Partnership, SXDC Ltd., Stemt' Emalt Limited Partnership (consolidated in 2024 as it cannot self-sustain). Livestock sales of $579,434. BC First Nations Gaming Revenue Sharing participation. Revenue sharing agreements and land referrals noted.
notes: Audit is qualified for multiple reasons: (1) PS 3280 Asset Retirement Obligation assessment not completed; (2) no approved budget presented; (3) inability to verify existence/completeness/valuation of inventory, TCA and productive biological assets as at March 31, 2023 related to B.C. Cattle Co. Limited acquisition, affecting 2024 comparatives. Stemt' Emalt Limited Partnership was consolidated in 2024 after being determined unable to self-sustain. Two GBEs accounted for by modified equity method: SXD Limited Partnership (99.99%) and SXDC Ltd. Seven entities fully consolidated including B.C. Cattle Co. Limited. Deferred revenue balance not fully extractable from truncated text. Long-term debt and TCA net book value not available from provided text. Expenses_education includes Elem/Sec & Post Sec ($901,111), Employment & Skills Training ($335,210), and Nation Operated School ($892,394) totalling $2,128,515 (slight rounding noted). Total government transfers estimated as ISC ($4,692,469) + Province of BC ($3,666,922) + DFO ($114,712) + FNHA ($451,888) + FNIESC ($320,310) + CMHC ($0) + Drinking water settlement ($77,382) + CCATEC ($56,776) + Enbridge ($87,000) + NSTS ($802,067) = $10,269,526 however some items like NSTS and CCATEC may be tribal council/other transfers not purely government; conservative estimate used. OSR calculated as total revenue minus government transfers.
